top_signals.title: Oil Declines as US Says Indirect Talks With Iran Were Positive
top_signals.summary: Oil extended its biggest quarterly drop since the pandemic as traders monitored peace talks between the US and Iran and the return of shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: U.S. Treasury yields edge higher as investors await Fed Chair Warsh’s talks in Europe
top_signals.summary: U.S. Treasury yields rose on Wednesday, as investors awaited more data and clues on the Federal Reserve's monetary policy path.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Pakistan Inflation Cools, Keeping Central Bank on Guard
top_signals.summary: Pakistan’s inflation eased last month, though it remained in double digits, keeping policymakers on guard against persistent price pressures.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Eurozone inflation falls more than expected to 2.8% in June
top_signals.summary: Price growth remains above central bank’s target for fourth month
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Nike results top estimates even as China sales drop 12%; retailer expects $986 million tariff refund
top_signals.summary: Nike was expected to report another quarter of declining sales as the sneaker giant struggles to regain strength under its turnaround strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
